creator: sh+freebsd-bugzilla@codevoid.de
text:
Created attachment 187973
playonbsd v4.2.12 svn diff

Hello,

I'm *not* the maintainer, but I have updated the playonlinux port to 4.2.12.

There are no changes on the port itself besides the version to fetch.

The changelog is not up to date. But the commits between 4.2.10 and 4.2.12 are all on the first page on https://github.com/PlayOnLinux/POL-POM-4/commits/master

Attached is the svn diff.

Thanks & Best Regards,
Stefan
